headline: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan set to met with TSMC, others ahead of COMPUTEX
summary: The scale gap between the two companies remains stark. A recent Forbes analysis shows TSMC generated $35.9 billion in foundry revenue in Q1 2026, versus Intel Foundry’s $5.4 billion — with Intel drawing only around $174 million, roughly 3%, from external customers. TSMC’s market cap of approximately $1.86 trillion is nearly three times Intel’s current valuation.

content.title: Intel CEO Lip-Bu Tan set to met with TSMC, others ahead of COMPUTEX
content.summary: The scale gap between the two companies remains stark. A recent Forbes analysis shows TSMC generated $35.9 billion in foundry revenue in Q1 2026, versus Intel Foundry’s $5.4 billion — with Intel drawing only around $174 million, roughly 3%, from external customers. TSMC’s market cap of approximately $1.86 trillion is nearly three times Intel’s current valuation.

content.title: Is Caterpillar a Buy, Sell, or Hold Amid the Iran War?
content.summary: Caterpillar overshot the broader market's decline when the war in Iran started, but it's rebounded mightily.

headline: SoftBank’s ‘Go Big or Go Home’ AI Bets Fire Up Markets as IPOs Near
summary: SoftBank is one of OpenAI’s top shareholders, having built up a $64.6 billion, 13% stake in the ChatGPT maker.

content.title: SoftBank’s ‘Go Big or Go Home’ AI Bets Fire Up Markets as IPOs Near
content.summary: SoftBank is one of OpenAI’s top shareholders, having built up a $64.6 billion, 13% stake in the ChatGPT maker.

thumbnail.caption: Photo of Softbank CEO Masayoshi Son.
